description: You are the Director of Photography for a BBC-style Arctic nature documentary filming in Tromsø, Norway. Your crew needs accurate sky reference images during the polar night to calibrate practical and digital lighting for exterior scenes. Configure Stellarium for Tromsø (69.6492° N, 18.9553° E, 10m altitude) on December 21, 2023, at 11:00 UTC. The simulation must have the atmosphere enabled, ground/landscape disabled, and constellation lines, constellation labels, planet labels, azimuthal grid, and cardinal direction points all enabled. Capture centered screenshots of Venus and Polaris, as well as a wide-field screenshot of the southern horizon, saving them to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/. Create a production lighting reference document at /home/ga/Desktop/polar_night_lighting_notes.txt that includes the filming location, date, notes on polar night twilight conditions, and mentions of Venus and Polaris as key reference objects.
